verses.commentary: Paul claims writing is unnecessary yet writes anyway. The rhetorical strategy affirms their known eagerness while providing gentle prodding toward completion.
Paul has been boasting about Corinthian eagerness to the Macedonians. Their readiness since last year stirred most Macedonians to action. One church's generosity catalyzes another's.
Sending the brothers ensures Paul's boasting doesn't prove hollow. Preparation prevents embarrassment; advance work guarantees readiness when the moment arrives.
If Macedonians come and find Corinth unprepared, both Paul and the Corinthians would be ashamed. Reputation is at stake; failure to follow through on commitment brings public disgrace.
Advance arrangements ensure the gift is ready as generous gift, not grudging obligation. Preparation transforms duty into grace; readiness affects the gift's spiritual quality.
Sowing and reaping principle: sparingly sown yields sparse harvest; generously sown yields abundant harvest. Agricultural metaphor establishes proportionality between giving and receiving.
Give what you decided in your heart, not reluctantly or under compulsion. God loves a cheerful giver. Attitude matters as much as amount; joy qualifies the gift.
God is able to make all grace abound so that having all sufficiency always, you will abound in every good work. The repeated 'all' emphasizes comprehensive divine provision.
Quoting Psalm 112:9: scattered gifts to the poor result in enduring righteousness. Scripture validates the principle that generosity has eternal significance.
God supplies seed to the sower and bread for food, and will supply and increase seed and enlarge righteousness harvest. Divine provision operates in two modes: sustenance and multiplication.
Enriched in every way to be generous on every occasion, producing thanksgiving to God through Paul's administration. Wealth's purpose is generosity; generosity's result is worship.
The service supplies material needs and overflows in many thanksgivings to God. Physical provision generates spiritual response; meeting needs triggers worship.
The service proves them, leading others to praise God for their obedient confession of Christ's gospel and generous sharing. Giving authenticates gospel profession.
Recipients' prayers for donors create relational bond because of the surpassing grace evident in the givers. Generosity generates intercession, weaving churches together.
Thanks be to God for His indescribable gift. The climax points beyond all human giving to God's ultimate gift in Christ, which grounds and enables all lesser giving.
